title: Oral contraceptive review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Requires understandable information, voluntary informed choice, client preference, consent, and freedom from coercion.
assessment.rationale: Supports voluntary informed method discussion and preferences.

source.title: Selected practice recommendations for contraceptive use, fourth edition
source.population: People seeking initiation, continuation, switching, or support for contraceptive method use after medical eligibility is established.
source.exclusions: Global exact guidance for informed contraceptive choice and practical method use; partial for UAE-specific law, prescribing, and full medical-eligibility assessment, which requires the companion MEC and local review. This batch also reviews method-follow-up, entered effects, and emergency-contraception sections. Eligibility, product selection, dosing, procedures and UAE availability remain clinician responsibilities. assessment.text: Supports documenting the method actually used, adherence or continuation, entered bleeding or other effects, satisfaction and clinician-arranged review. It does not diagnose an adverse reaction or select a replacement method.
